case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SERGIO MATTOS FERREIRA

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NARALLANI SANCHEZ LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SERGIO MATTOS FERREIRAIS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506).
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.22 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, SERGIO MATTOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
